products.name: MX12B
products.descriptor: World's smallest AIMS-certified micro Mode 5 IFF transponder with ADS-B In/Out

evidence.snippet:
MX12B
=====
Mode 5 IFF Transponder

Sagetech’s MX12B is the world’s first AIMS certified micro Mode 5 IFF transponder designed for ease of use, packaged in a simple all-in-one box solution.
Our next-gen MX12B transponder is the only micro Mode 5 IFF transponder fully compliant with DOD AIMS Mk XIIB specification and is the first Mode 5 Level 2B Out transponder to be certified.

products.name: MXS Mode S Transponder
products.descriptor: FAA-certified micro Mode S transponder with first-ever integrated ADS-B In/Out

evidence.snippet: Sagetech’s next-gen MXS Mode S micro-transponder is the [first FAA-certified](https://sagetech.com/news-and-events/faa-certifies-new-sagetech-avionics-mode-s-micro-transponder-with-integrated-ads-b-in-out/) small transponder to have an integrated ADS-B In receiver and is the first small, certified ADS-B receiver in the world.

### MXS Mode S Transponder
Sagetech’s FAA-certified next-gen MXS miniature transponder provides Modes A, C, S and 1090 MHz ADS-B in/out for worldwide compliance of your crewed or uncrewed system.
**[LEARN MORE](https://sagetech.com/transponders/mxs-mode-s-transponder/)**

evidence.snippet: [Sagetech Avionics Awarded $248.5M Army Contract for APX-128 Advanced IFF Production](https://sagetech.com/news-and-events/sagetech-avionics-awarded-248-5m-army-contract-for-apx-128-advanced-iff-production/)

products.name: ACAS Xu
products.descriptor: Certifiable ACAS-based all-in-one detect-and-avoid system for fixed-wing UAS over 55 lb

evidence.snippet:
### Xu: Fixed Wing Aircraft
**55lbs | >400 AGL
**Navigate BVLOS safely through all airspace with this certifiable, ACAS-based, all-in-one detect and avoid system in a single low-SWaP package including our integrated cooperative traffic interrogator, plug-n-play compatible with common non-cooperative sensors.

products.name: ACAS sXu
products.descriptor: ACAS-based all-in-one detect-and-avoid system for small UAS under 55 lb and 400 AGL

evidence.snippet:
### sXu: Small, Uncrewed Aircraft
**<55lbs | <400 AGL
**Protect your investment and fly even the smallest aircraft BVLOS with Sagtech’s all-in-one ACAS sXu system. Low SWaP and integrated with autopilots and non-cooperative sensors. Dual-band ADS-B receiver for cooperative traffic. This product services fixed and rotary wing small UAS.

products.name: ACAS Xr
products.descriptor: ACAS-based collision avoidance system for rotary-wing UAM/AAM aircraft

evidence.snippet:
### Xr: Rotary Wing Aircraft
**\>55lbs | >400 AGL
**The ACAS Xr will serve UAM and other rotary wing aircraft flying various in-corridor and non-corridor routes that require low SWaP, certified ACAS-based collision avoidance capability.

products.name: MX Series
products.descriptor: Family of next-gen miniature transponders and interrogators with ADS-B In/Out, IFF Mode 5, and DAA

evidence.snippet:
These new transponders and interrogators deliver everything you need for tomorrow’s situational awareness programs—ADS-B In and Out, IFF Mode 5, detect and avoid, omni-directional surveillance, and other advanced functionality. See and be seen for enhanced safety.
Built from our mission-proven technology platform, our solutions serve as essential equipment on any unmanned or manned program.

products.name: MXS
products.descriptor: FAA-certified miniature Mode S transponder with ADS-B In/Out for crewed and uncrewed aircraft

evidence.snippet:
MXS
===
Mode S Transponder

Sagetech’s FAA-certified next-gen MXS miniature transponder provides Modes A, C, S and and 1090 MHz ADS-B in/out for crewed or uncrewed systems worldwide. Each transponder offers user-friendly command and control software plus a full suite of test and integration components.

evidence.snippet:
Sagetech Avionics Awarded $248.5M Army Contract for APX-128 Advanced IFF Production
===================================================================================

Sagetech ([https://www.sagetech.com](https://www.sagetech.com/)) is extremely proud to support our warfighters with this low size, weight, power and cost system, providing significant upgrade options while seamlessly replacing legacy obsolete hardware.
